scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && bash -lc 'source scripts/android-build-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug'
scripts.android:bundle:release: npm run cap:sync && npm run android:signing:init && bash -lc 'source scripts/android-build-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease' && node scripts/copy-android-release-artifacts.mjs
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run cap:sync && npm run android:signing:init && bash -lc 'source scripts/android-build-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease' && node scripts/copy-android-release-artifacts.mjs
scripts.android:release:all: npm run cap:sync && npm run android:signing:init && bash -lc 'source scripts/android-build-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease assembleRelease' && node scripts/copy-android-release-artifacts.mjs
